basic_details.short_information: Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Store Keeper. Candidates Graduate, PG Diploma, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UCSL official website cochinshipyard.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management OR Minimum of three-year Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical or Electrical or Electronics or Mechatronics or Marine or Shipbuilding).

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Scale W4 (₹17000-61020). Monthly emoluments approx. ₹29,997.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UCSL Store Keeper Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: UCSL Store Keeper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
